title: Stablecoin Firm Raises $222M, Challenging Ethereum's Dominance
summary: A stablecoin company raised $222M, signaling a shift towards institutional crypto adoption and potentially diminishing Ethereum's relevance.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the growing competition in the crypto space and the increasing influence of institutional investors.

title: K-Shaped Economy Persists Due to Inflation and Inequality
summary: Research indicates the US economy remains K-shaped, driven by inflation's uneven impact and widening economic disparities.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the uneven economic recovery and the challenges faced by different segments of the population.

title: Investment Strategy for Inflationary Environment
